'''√th-ng-s''' ('''thangasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:curmur|curmur]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ng-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:curmur|curmur]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √th-ng-s
|-
! Lemma
| thangasa
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thangasithi || thangasiji || thangasishi || thangasi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thangasuthuth || thangasujuj || thangasushush || thangas
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thangasuthu || thangasuju || thangasushu || thangasu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thangasufuth || thangasufuj || thangasufush || thangasuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thangasethe || thangaseje || thangaseshe || thangase
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thangasothoth || thangasojoj || thangasoshosh || thangas
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thangasotho || thangasojo || thangasosho || thangaso
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thangasofoth || thangasofoj || thangasofosh || thangasof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || thangasïf || thangasïf || thangasïf || thangasïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || thangasïfïf || thangasïfïf || thangasïfïf || thangasïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || thangasïf || thangasïf || thangasïf || thangasïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || thangasïf || thangasïf || thangasïf || thangasïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thangasæthæ || thangasæjæ || thangasæshæ || thangasæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thangasathath || thangasajaj || thangasashash || thangas
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thangasatha || thangasaja || thangasasha || thangasa
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thangasafath || thangasafaj || thangasafash || thangasaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || thangasasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gothangasasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokithangasasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || thangasnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gothangasnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokithangasnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || thangasshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gothangasnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokithangasshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || thangasroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gothangasnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokithangasroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || thangasmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gothangasnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokithangasmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || thangassherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gothangasnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokithangassherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || thangasngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gothangasnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokithangasngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || thangasyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gothangasnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokithangasyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || thangasyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gothangasnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokithangasyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || thangasnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gothangasnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokithangasnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || thangasnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gothangasnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokithangasnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || thangasnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gothangasnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokithangasnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || thangasshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gothangasnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokithangasshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || thangasshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gothangasnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokithangasshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || thangasshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gothangasnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokithangasshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || thangasronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gothangasnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokithangasronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || thangasroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gothangasnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokithangasroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || thangasromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gothangasnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokithangasromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || thangasmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gothangasnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokithangasmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || thangasmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gothangasnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokithangasmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || thangasmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gothangasnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokithangasmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || thangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || thængæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hothangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hothængæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohothangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohothængæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüthangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüthængæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüthangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüthængæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïthangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïthængæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïthangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïthængæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || luthangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luthængæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luluthangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluthængæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lithangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lithængæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilithangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilithængæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kothangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kothængæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokothangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokothængæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kethangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kethængæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekethangas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekethængæs
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
